case_title: PARRA, MARIA vs. MADRIGAL, JESUS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARRA, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT MADRIGAL, JESUS MADRIGAL, CHRISTINA DOES I TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MADRIGAL, CHRISTINA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARRA, MARIA COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-10-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. NOT PRESENT, BUT REPRE- SENTED BY STEVEN A. MACDONALD. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1066 FLORIDA ST, S.F, CA. - ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES - EVIC- TION STAYED TO 12-15-93 UNLESS DEF. PAYS 1/2 MO. RENT OF $450 BY 12-1-93 TO PL. ATTY. & THEN EVICTION STAYED TO 12-31-93 - DEF. RELINQUISHES RIGHT TO ANY FURTHER STAYS - THERE IS A MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS ARISING FROM THE CASE - THE SECURITY DEPOSIT/LAST MO. RENT IS FORF. TO PL. - ANY POSSESSIONS LEFT ON PREMISES WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT MADRIGAL, JESUS
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS MADRIGAL, CHRISTINA TO BE MADRIGAL, CHRISTINA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADRIGAL, CHRISTINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1066 FLORIDA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EXECUTION THRU MIDNIGHT 12/31/93 IF DEFT PAYS HALF MONTH'S RENT OF $450.00 BY 5PM 12/1/93. IF DEFT FAILS TO PAY PLTF MAY BY EX PARTE APPLIC OBTAIN AN ORDER LIFTING STAY OF EXECUTION. BUT NO ACTUAL PHYSICAL EVICTION UNTIL AFTER MID- NIGHT 12/14/93. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND ORDER LIFTING STAY OF EXECUTION DECLARATION OF PLTF'S ATTY RE DEFAULT IN PAYMENT ATTACHED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARRA, MARIA
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MADRIGAL, JESUS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
